messages.content: Mission target: 192.168.1.0/24. Begin the engagement now. Spawn the appropriate first agent.

{"thought": "SITUATION: Engagement just started. Target: 192.168.1.0/24. No hosts or services known yet. Phase: recon/scoping. According to PTES, first step is network surveying to identify live hosts and open ports. I need a complete picture before any exploitation attempts. HYPOTHESIS: The /24 subnet likely contains multiple hosts, some of which will expose services vulnerable to known exploits. But without scan data, any exploitation would be blind guessing. DECISION: Spawn a single scanner agent to perform host discovery and comprehensive port/service enumeration across the entire 192.168.1.0/24 range. This is the mandatory first action — no exploits until scan results are available. Options: none; scanning must come first.", "action": "spawn_agent", "parameters": {"agent_type": "scanner", "target": "192.168.1.0/24", "task_type": "full_port_scan_and_service_detection", "options": {}}}
